properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm feeling so small I'm standing here weeping As I'm coming clean Of the secrets I'm keeping 'Cause I've caused so much pain To the ones I love the most And I'm falling apart As I carry my heart to Your throne

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am completely surrendering Finally giving You everything You're my redeemer, I run to the cross Because You are more than enough Lord complete me 'Cause I'm Yours completely

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm letting go There's nothing I own The treasures I held Just weighed down my soul And there's nothing left Inside of me But a longing for You And a longing to be the man that You need

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I let Your gifts take the place of you But You pulled up my selfishness from its roots I am a broken and fragile me But I'm where You want me to be

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord complete me 'Cause I'm Yours completely
